# FINALIZE_GOVERNED_CHATGPT_INTERPRETATION_BRIDGE_V2

## Status

Frozen and certified.

This milestone certifies the bounded conversational ingress topology:

`Human -> ChatGPT-style conversational reasoning -> Browser Companion / ChatGPT Bridge V2 -> AiGOL governed interpretation boundary -> Governance runtime -> Authorization-gated execution -> Replay-certified observability`

## Certified Included Components

1. ChatGPT-style conversational input normalization
2. bounded conversational request mapping
3. replay identity generation
4. downstream governed request description
5. browser companion conversational mode
6. bridge boundary guarantees
7. explicit confirmation preservation
8. non-authoritative ChatGPT semantics
9. fail-closed ambiguity handling
10. exact-match bounded vocabulary

## Constitutional Statement

ChatGPT reasoning is non-authoritative and cannot directly trigger execution.

## Certified Exclusions

- ChatGPT execution authority
- automatic ChatGPT-to-runtime transfer
- hidden page reading
- full conversation scraping
- hidden context ingestion
- automatic Codex dispatch
- automatic authority issuance
- orchestration
- retries/fallbacks
- hidden continuation
- autonomous execution
- implicit approvals
- broad NLP interpretation
- worker routing
- public runtime exposure

## Closure Statement

The governed ChatGPT interpretation bridge V2 epoch is closed. Conversational
reasoning may be represented as a bounded governance ingress signal, but it does
not become authority.
